# Venator UI

> React + TypeScript UI system: primitives → patterns → deployable architectures.

## Packages

- @venator-ui/ui — UI primitives: Button, Card, Input, Modal, Table, Toast, Badge, Avatar, Breadcrumb, Alert, Select, Separator, Skeleton, Switch, Tabs, Toggle, Tooltip, CodeBlock, Nav, Label
- @venator-ui/patterns — layout compositions: DashboardLayout, SidebarNav, Topbar, PageHeader, ModuleGrid, StatCard
- @venator-ui/tokens — Tailwind CSS preset and design tokens
- @venator-ui/cli — deploys archetypes and adds patterns to existing projects

## Archetypes

Full Next.js App Router projects, copied into your project via CLI. No runtime dependency.

- dashboard — KPI cards, analytics, settings
- admin — user table with roles and status, organization settings
- ai-tool — chat input, response view, history, model settings

## CLI

```bash
npx @venator-ui/cli init dashboard
npx @venator-ui/cli init admin
npx @venator-ui/cli init ai-tool
npx @venator-ui/cli add dashboard-layout
npx @venator-ui/cli add sidebar-nav
npx @venator-ui/cli add page-header
npx @venator-ui/cli add topbar
npx @venator-ui/cli add stat-card
npx @venator-ui/cli add module-grid
```

## Install

```bash
npm install @venator-ui/ui @venator-ui/patterns
```

## Docs

- https://venator-ui-docs.vercel.app
- https://venator-ui-docs.vercel.app/docs/getting-started/introduction
- https://venator-ui-docs.vercel.app/docs/components/button
- https://venator-ui-docs.vercel.app/docs/patterns/dashboard-layout
- https://venator-ui-docs.vercel.app/docs/archetypes/dashboard
